---
title: "Título"
author:
  - Yan Rodríguez-Hachimaru
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [a4paper, 11pt]
    geometry: "top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm, left=2.5cm, right=2.5cm"
    linestretch: 1.15
    cite-method: citeproc
    include-in-header:
      - file: assets/draft/preamble.tex
    toc: false
---

{{< include content/00-Draft.qmd >}}
{{< include content/01-Analisis.qmd >}}


\pagebreak

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
